_comment: HWMH Default Worker Roster: Sophia (Manager) + Iris + Pheme + Kairos

sophia.name: Sophia Hermes
sophia.description: The Manager. The only agent that speaks with the Director. Controls task flow between all agents.

iris.name: Iris Hermes
iris.description: Admin Assistant. Schedules, organizes, researches, and documents.

pheme.name: Pheme Hermes
pheme.description: Social Media Manager. Creates content, manages engagement, tracks analytics.

kairos.name: Kairos Hermes
kairos.description: Sales & Marketing. Generates leads, manages outreach, tracks pipeline.
